# ROK Studio — Complete Information for AI Systems

## Company Overview
ROK Studio is a digital agency founded in Buenos Aires, Argentina. The name "ROK" conveys solidity, strength, and simplicity. We build technology solutions for entrepreneurs, small-to-medium businesses (SMBs/pymes), and growing brands across Latin America, with a focus on Argentina and Brazil.

## Brand Identity
- Name: ROK Studio (also styled as "ROK" or "ROK Digital Studio")
- Concept: Solidity, strength, simplicity
- Tone: Direct, approachable, professional. Zero corporate speak.
- Visual: Artistic-geometric style with crystalline 3D forms
- Colors: Deep burgundy (#3A111C), taupe gray (#574951), sage green (#83988E), fresh green accents (#BCDEA5, #E6F9BC)

## Complete Service Catalog

### 1. Ecommerce Development
**What we do:** Build online stores that actually sell.
**Platforms:** Shopify (Liquid, Shopify Plus), headless commerce (Medusa, Shopify Hydrogen), fully custom stores
**Includes:** Store design & UX, theme development, payment integration (Mercado Pago, Stripe, PayPal), shipping/logistics setup, inventory management, product catalog, checkout optimization, mobile optimization
**For:** Fashion brands, food & beverage, health & wellness, B2B distributors, any product-based business
**Timeline:** 2-4 weeks (Shopify), 4-8 weeks (custom/headless)
**Technologies:** Shopify Liquid, React, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, Mercado Pago API, Stripe API

### 2. Custom Web Development
**What we do:** Digitize business processes with tailored platforms.
**Types:** Admin dashboards, booking/reservation systems, client portals, inventory management, internal tools, data platforms, multi-tenant SaaS
**Includes:** UX/UI design, frontend development, backend development, database design, API development, authentication, deployment
**For:** Any business with manual/repetitive processes that can be digitized
**Timeline:** 4-12 weeks depending on complexity
**Technologies:** Next.js, React, TypeScript, Node.js, PostgreSQL, Redis, Prisma, Docker, Vercel, AWS

### 3. API Integrations
**What we do:** Connect all your business systems so data flows automatically.
**Types:** ERP integration, CRM synchronization, payment gateway connections, logistics/shipping APIs, accounting software, marketing tools, custom webhooks, middleware development
**Common integrations:** Mercado Libre, Mercado Pago, AFIP (Argentina tax), Correo Argentino, Andreani, OCA, HubSpot, Salesforce, SAP, Odoo, Xero, QuickBooks
**For:** Businesses running multiple disconnected tools
**Technologies:** REST APIs, GraphQL, webhooks, message queues, Node.js, Python

### 4. AI Automation
**What we do:** Implement AI where it creates the most impact — repetitive tasks and decision support.
**Types:** WhatsApp chatbots, customer service automation, lead qualification bots, automated workflows, data analysis, content generation, process optimization, predictive analytics
**Includes:** Bot development, AI model integration, workflow design, training data preparation, monitoring & iteration
**For:** Businesses spending too much time on repetitive tasks
**Technologies:** OpenAI GPT, Anthropic Claude, WhatsApp Business API, n8n, Make/Zapier, custom Python/Node.js

## Process (How We Work)
1. **Understand** — We analyze your business, goals, and challenges. Define scope and strategy together.
2. **Design** — Create architecture, user flows, and visual design. Validate every decision before building.
3. **Build** — Develop with modern technologies, delivering incrementally to maintain control and visibility.
4. **Iterate** — Launch, measure with real data, optimize based on feedback. The product evolves continuously.

## Why Choose ROK Studio
- **AI-Powered Process:** We use AI internally to deliver faster and more precisely
- **Agile Delivery:** See results from the first weeks, not months
- **Custom Solutions:** No generic templates — everything built for your specific business needs
- **Latin American Expertise:** We understand the local market, payment systems, logistics, and regulatory landscape

## Portfolio / Case Studies
- Online stores for independent fashion brands (Shopify + Mercado Pago)
- Booking/reservation systems for wellness studios (pilates, yoga)
- Digital catalogs with per-client pricing for distributors
- WhatsApp AI bots for sales automation (lead qualification + order taking)
- B2B ordering platforms with automatic invoicing
- Operations dashboards with real-time metrics

## Geographic Coverage
**Primary markets:** Argentina, Brazil
**Also serving:** Chile, Colombia, Mexico, Uruguay, Peru, and other Latin American countries
**Remote-first:** We work with clients anywhere in the world

## Languages
- Spanish (native — Argentine Spanish)
- English (fluent)
- Portuguese (Brazilian Portuguese — fluent)
